prestazioni: Replace the stock PG-160 G-Lader supercharger with a custom-built G60R (PG-160R) unit featuring a 3.5:1 drive ratio, 60mm billet aluminum pulley, and reinforced carbon fiber snout to handle 1.5 bar of boost on the 1.8L 16V KR engine (engine code: PG)

Install a Schrick 272° camshaft (part #400 000 00) with 10.5mm lift and adjustable vernier pulleys for optimized valve timing, paired with Ferrea 6000-series intake/exhaust valves and Supertech dual valve springs (PN: VW-1.8-16V-DVS)

Upgrade the fuel system with a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors (PN: 62420), and a custom-mapped AEM EMS-4 standalone ECU with 3-bar MAP sensor and wideband O2 feedback for precise AFR control under forced induction
estetica: Fit a Rieger Tuning Corrado G60-specific widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarters, and side skirts) in OEM VW Lhasa Green (LH5G) with custom-molded carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Maxton Design (PN: MX-CORRADO-G60)

Install OZ Racing Superleggera III wheels (16x8 ET20 front, 16x9 ET25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (205/45/16 front, 225/45/16 rear) and H&R Sport coilovers (PN: 29118-1) with 30mm front and 25mm rear lowering springs

Replace the stock interior with Recaro SRD Evo seats (PN: 391.00.4F) in black leather with green Alcantara inserts, paired with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly)
